nodes.label: AI as time-saving tool for disliked tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI as time-wasting for tasks requiring expertise
nodes.grounding_span: I like to use AI to do tasks that I don't enjoy doing on my own

nodes.label: AI reliability in generating accurate content
nodes.label_negative: AI unreliability with math errors and incorrect assumptions
nodes.grounding_span: there are often math mistakes in the problems that are created or the answers that are given

nodes.label: AI as instructional design collaborator
nodes.label_negative: AI as inadequate for expert-driven design
nodes.grounding_span: I love designing instruction, so I expect a lot from AI with the design

nodes.label: AI as student learning facilitator
nodes.grounding_span: I want students to recognize that they are using AI to help them get better at solving problems, not using AI to get the answer for them

nodes.label: AI as relationship builder in teaching
nodes.label_negative: AI as incapable of building relationships
nodes.grounding_span: My job as a math teacher is to build relationships with students

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: I am trying to save time by using AI

nodes.label: Accuracy and correctness
nodes.grounding_span: there are often math mistakes in the problems

nodes.label: Student learning and cognitive development
nodes.grounding_span: building a brain structure in students that will be able to process information and make intelligent, informed decisions

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for recommendation letters
nodes.grounding_span: AI is amazing at writing letters of recommendation

nodes.label: Frustration with AI for math problems
nodes.grounding_span: this will end up taking me more time than if I just rewrite the problems myself

nodes.label: Mixed feelings about AI for instructional design
nodes.grounding_span: I often find I don't like what AI suggests

nodes.label: Optimism about AI for student feedback
nodes.grounding_span: I am really hoping that AI will allow me to give more immediate feedback to students

nodes.label: Iterative refinement through correction and customization
nodes.grounding_span: I will have to ask the AI to go back and fix it

nodes.label: Domain-based task differentiation
nodes.grounding_span: I like to use AI to do tasks that I don't enjoy doing on my own
